title: LiteratureCard (slim, architecture v2)
$comment: v2 slim card: metadata + coarse tags + a fixed-format coarse summary (non-fact, for linking only). No quotes/evidence/claims-with-numbers -- facts live in reading blocks. Built by src/docdecomp/slim_card.py. The v1 thick schema (key_findings/study_design/evidence_atoms/etc.) is deprecated; see CONNECTION_PLAN.md.

classification.description: Coarse normalized tags. research_objects/methods/domain_tags should not all be empty.

summary.description: Direction-level coarse summary for cross-paper linking only. NOT a fact source; no precise numbers.

main_findings.description: 2-6 direction-level statements (what raises/lowers/affects what); no precise numbers.
